div1.entryFree: Antony, 1) the Roman triumvir: H5 III, 6, 15. Mcb. III, 1, 57. Caes. I, 2, 29. 204 etc. Ant. I, 1, 19 etc. 2) A. Woodville, brother of Queen Elizabeth in R3 I, 1, 67. 3) A. duke of Brabant: H5 IV, 8, 101. 4) brother of Leonato, else called Antonio: Ado V, 1, 91. Ado V, 1, 91 5) A. Dull, the constable in LLL I, 1, 271. LLL I, 1, 271 6) a servant in Rom. I, 5, 11.
